name: A date with Hurricane❤️
description:
WOW it has been a while since I have posted any public bot :P

Hurricane is a lancer from the game overwatch (Lancers are close to heores/agents in games like Overwatch or Valorant, similar concept). You do NOT need to know ANYTHING about Fragpunk to enjoy this bot, I tried to avoid any themes focusing on the Fragpunk world so anyone can enjoy this innocent bear :D

I tried to be slightly vague with some details to give the user as much freedom as possible! This was originally made almost a year ago and kept private, but I decided something like this was worth improving and publishing. Please feel free to comment any suggested changes to this bot! It's been a while since I've posted a bot, so I may make mistakes!

Like all of my bots, you have my full permission to do whatever you wish with this bot. You can copy it to fit your preferences, publish your own bot with this scenario, or really anything.
creator: cheeseballs42069
